indeed.name: Indeed
recent_changes: Indeed Connect premium tier launching Jan 2026
Shift to AI and new monetization models
ARPJ (Average Revenue Per Job) is new KPI
pros: largest job site globally by traffic
massive candidate pool across all levels
cons: CPA model can be unpredictable for costs
declining organic reach for free postings

linkedin.name: LinkedIn
linkedin.avg_cpa: $161 per hire (ad spend only), $4,700 total hiring cost
recent_changes: OpenAI building competing platform for mid-2026
pros: highest quality candidates for professional roles
employees sourced are 40% less likely to leave within 6 months
cons: most expensive job board per click
can be oversaturated for some roles
less effective for hourly and blue collar
